name: PURI THE ARAVALLIS
description: PURI THE ARAVALLIS in Sector 61, Gurugram is a highly anticipated residential project by Puri Construction Pvt.Ltd. The development is well underway with swift construction progress and will offer luxurious 3BHK & 4BHK apartments with premium finishes, grand podium levels, and state-of-the-art infrastructure.
highlights: External UPVC Work Included
Fast-paced Construction by Ahluwalia Contracts
Tower A, B & C Progressing Rapidly
advantages: Located in the premium Sector 61, Gurugram
Excellent connectivity and surroundings
Dedicated EWS and Non-Tower Areas

name: BELAPERLA
description: BELAPERLA by Central Park is an ultra-premium residential development in Sector 48, Gurgaon. This project introduces luxury Studio and 1 BHK layouts under an exclusive Lease Guarantee Scheme, offering exceptional returns and premier asset management by Central Park.
amenities: Bespoke Managed Services by Central Park
highlights: Studio at ₹38,000/sq.ft. and 1 BHK at ₹40,000/sq.ft.
Lease Guarantee of ₹180/- per sq.ft. monthly during tenure
Central Park managed asset preservation during lease scheme
Deluxe configurations across Ground Floor, UG-1, and UG-2
advantages: Located in Sector 48, Gurgaon — a highly consolidated prime corridor
Flexible payment plan: 10% in 30 days, 10% in 60 days, and 80% on possession
Immediate proximity to key retail hubs, hospitals, and NH-48
Central Park Brand Trust and premium legacy execution

name: THE MĀRQ
description: THE MĀRQ by Adani Realty & M2K is an ultra-premium, wellness-themed residential community located in Sector 102A along Gurgaon's prime Dwarka Expressway. Designed for wellness and curated for life, it features low-density corner apartments across G+46 floor towers, complete with a luxury clubhouse, biophilic landscaping, and a vehicle-free ground surface.
highlights: Low-density development with G+46 premium towers
All apartments are corner units optimizing natural light and ventilation
3-level basement parking ensuring a vehicular-free ground surface
Premium interior specs: VRV air conditioning and modular kitchen
advantages: Direct connectivity to South-West Delhi via the 16-lane Dwarka Expressway
Immediate proximity to upcoming Gurgaon Global City Hub
15 minutes drive to IGI Airport terminal
Joint development by Adani Realty and M2K India

name: Emaar India Business Centre (IBC)
location: Sector 61, Golf Course Extension Road, Gurugram
description: Emaar India Business Centre (IBC) is a state-of-the-art mixed-use commercial landmark spanning over 5.65 acres with 1.5 million sq. ft. of premium spaces. Located in Sector 61 along Gurgaon's prime Golf Course Extension Road, it features Grade-A offices and boutique retail zones carefully designed to optimize energy efficiency and vertical mobility.
amenities: MERV-grade Clean Air Filters & Heat Recovery
highlights: State-of-the-art development of 1.5 million sq. ft.
Grade-A workspace environment complying with Seismic Zone 4
Consumes 12% less energy than standard benchmarks
Double-height entrance lobby & destination control lift system
advantages: Strategic location right on Golf Course Extension Road, Sector 61
Adjacent to Sector 55-56 Rapid Metro Station for easy transit
Surrounded by high-end residential communities in Sector 58, 59, 61, 62, 63, 65
Only 20 km drive to Delhi International Airport (IGI)

name: BPTP Gaia Residences
description: BPTP Gaia Residences is a state-of-the-art ultra-luxury high-rise development located in Sector 102, Gurugram, along the prime Dwarka Expressway corridor. Featuring India's first complete glass façade on the expressway, it blends iconic architecture with IGBC Platinum pre-certified wellness systems, lush sky gardens, and an expansive clubhouse ecosystem.
highlights: First-of-its-kind full glass-faced residential facade on Dwarka Expressway
IGBC Platinum pre-certified project incorporating green engineering
Massive 1.8 lakh sq. ft. club sanctuary with over 50 lifestyle amenities
Seismic Zone V compliant structural layout for maximum safety
advantages: Strategic location in Sector 102 directly on Dwarka Expressway
Direct, rapid access to South-West Delhi and upcoming Global City Hub
Excellent connectivity to Delhi International Airport (IGI)
Part of the integrated BPTP Amstoria township infrastructure

name: Ireo The Corridors
description: Ireo The Corridors offers ultra‑luxury ready‑to‑move‑in apartments with expansive amenities across 37.5 acres in Sector 67A, Gurgaon.
highlights: Luxury marble in living and dining
Wooden flooring and kitchen work
Chimney‑Hob, store room in every apartment
advantages: Bank loan options: SBI, HDFC, PNB, ICICI
Dream Home Starting @2.59 cr
25:75 payment plan

name: Birla Navya Avik Phase 2
description: Birla Navya Avik Phase 2 is an exclusive 'LifeDesigned' gated community in Sector 63A, Gurugram. It offers a secure, multi-tier lifestyle with Grand Entrance Lobbies, Sunken Courts, and an incredible array of curated amenities designed to elevate everyday living.
amenities: Forest Zone, Palm Court & Lily Pond
highlights: Grand entrance lobby with access control for maximum security
Basements with sunken courts for natural light and ventilation
Exclusive terrace design with elegant wooden-finish tiles
Rainwater harvesting, RO wastewater reuse, and A/C water utilization
advantages: Premium Italian Marble in Living & Dining
Laminate Wooden Flooring in Bedrooms
Modular Kitchens with Hob & Chimney provided
Comprehensive multi-tier security and fire safety

name: Trehan Luxury Floors
description: Trehan Luxury Floors in Sector 70A introduces a highly exclusive, low-density living experience. These premium independent floors combine privacy with grand architectural layouts, featuring smart home automation, expansive terraces, and highly curated interiors for an unmatched residential lifestyle.
highlights: Low-density living ensuring absolute privacy and space
Vastu-compliant layouts with optimal natural ventilation
High-end modular kitchens and luxury bath fittings
Strategic connectivity to SPR and Golf Course Extension Road
advantages: Located in the rapidly developing Sector 70A micro-market
Seamless connectivity to major commercial hubs and schools
Premium Italian Marble and wooden flooring specifications
Immediate access to top-tier healthcare and retail

name: Estate 361
description: Estate 361 by Max Estates introduces the LiveWell & WorkWell philosophy to Sector 36A, Gurugram. Designed by globally renowned Gensler (UK), this IGBC Platinum Pre-certified project sets a new benchmark in sustainable luxury with integrated wellness clinics and an expansive ecosystem.
highlights: Antara Senior Living collaboration for dedicated senior wellness spaces
Low-VOC materials to transform your home into a sanctuary
High-performance glass windows optimizing natural light while filtering heat
Centralized water heating system and designer low-flow fixtures
advantages: Access to comprehensive everyday services managed by a dedicated concierge
Pioneering sustainable practices including organic waste composters
Developed by the legacy Max Group (Healthcare, Real Estate, Hospitality)
Vastu-compliant architecture designed by leading global experts

name: Serenity Hills Phase 1
description: Serenity Hills Phase 1 in Sector 86, Gurugram, introduces 'A Greener Evolution'. This highly exclusive residential enclave boasts 8 acres of central greens and a breathtaking waterfront promenade. Designed for an active lifestyle, it offers expansive open spaces and IGBC Platinum Pre-Certified energy efficiency.
amenities: ~1 Lakh Sq. Ft. of World-Class Amenities
Over 20+ Acres of Landscaped Open Space
highlights: Over 80% of homes overlook central greens or are corner units
More than 90% of homes feature full-height corner windows for natural light
Stretched continuous balconies connecting multiple rooms
Energy-efficient and water-saving architecture
advantages: Prime location in Sector 86, Gurugram
Spacious 3BHK+3T+U (1,219 sq. ft. carpet) and 3BHK+2T (947 sq. ft. carpet) layouts
Significant reduction in heat island effect due to low ground coverage
Construction linked payment plans available

name: The Trillion
description: The Trillion by Experion offers a signature collection of 3 & 4 BHK Luxury Homes in the prime locale of Sector 48, Gurugram. Backed by an FDI Real Estate Developer (A Singapore Group Company), this magnificent trio of high-rise towers redefines the skyline and promises that '#THETRILLIONLIFE IT'S EVERYTHING YOU SEEK'.
highlights: Developed by Experion, a 100% FDI funded real estate developer (Singapore Group)
Three iconic high-rise towers offering breathtaking panoramic views
Unmatched connectivity via Sohna Road and NH-8
Exclusive low-density living in a highly sought-after micro-market
advantages: Located in the established and premium Sector 48, Gurugram
Immediate access to top international schools and hospitals
Bespoke luxury interiors with grand floor-to-ceiling heights
Comprehensive application and payment plan support available
